---
title: "GATA3/PPARG Scoring"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Setup

```{r}
#| echo: false

library(here)
# here::i_am("README.Rmd")

if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("BiocManager")
}

BiocManager::install(c("GEOquery", "impute"))
library(here)
library(samr)
library(GEOquery)
library(limma)
library(tidyverse)

# =========
# Functions
# =========

#Convert to 90th percentile of log(tpm+1)
cpm_to_uq_log2 <- function(cpm_matrix) {
  uq <- apply(cpm_matrix, 2, function(x) quantile(x[x > 0], 0.75))
  scaled <- sweep(cpm_matrix, 2, uq, "/") * 1000
  log2(scaled + 1)
}
```

## Get PPARG Signatures (their data)

```{r}
#| echo: false
gse <- getGEO("GSE47993", GSEMatrix = TRUE)[[1]]
expr <- exprs(gse)

expr_umuc9 <- expr[, c("GSM1164283","GSM1164284","GSM1164285",  # control samples
                       "GSM1164286","GSM1164287","GSM1164288") # rosi treated samples
]

# Get gene names from illumina probe IDs (they used IlluminaHT-12 V4.0 expression beadchip)
anno <- fData(gse)
gene_symbols <- anno[rownames(expr_umuc9), "Symbol"]

# keep probes with valid gene symbols
expr_annotated <- expr_umuc9[!is.na(gene_symbols) & gene_symbols != "", ]
gene_symbols <- gene_symbols[!is.na(gene_symbols) & gene_symbols != ""]
# Collapse multiple probes per gene
expr_matrix <- avereps(expr_annotated, ID = gene_symbols) # now have gene expression x sample matrix
group_labels <- c(1,1,1,2,2,2) #1=ctrl, #2=rosi-treated


sam_data <- list(
  x = expr_matrix, 
  y = group_labels,
  geneid = rownames(expr_matrix),
  genenames = rownames(expr_matrix),
  logged2 = TRUE
)

samr_obj <- samr(
  data=sam_data, resp.type = "Two class unpaired", nperms = 100)
delta_table <- samr.compute.delta.table(samr_obj)


# Choose a delta where median FDR < 0.05
# -b/c delta != FDR
delta_df <- as.data.frame(delta_table)
chosen_delta <- delta_df[delta_df[, "median FDR"] < 0.05, "delta"][1]

# get significant genes in rosi vs ctrl
sig <- samr.compute.siggenes.table(
  samr.obj = samr_obj,
  del = chosen_delta,
  data = sam_data,
  delta.table = delta_table
)
```

**PPARG Signatures**

```{r}
# Significant upregulated genes AKA genes induced by rosi (downstream most likely)
pparg_sig <- sig$genes.up[, "Gene Name"]
head(pparg_sig)

#number of genes upregulated
sig$ngenes.up
```

**GATA3 Signatures**

```{r}
gata3_sig <- c(
  "ADCY1", "GATA3", "GNAS", "IL13", "IL1A", "IL4", "IL5",
  "JUNB", "MAF", "MAP2K3", "MAP2K6", "MAPK14", "NFATC1",
  "PRKACB", "PRKACG", "PRKAR1A", "PRKAR1B", "PRKAR2A", "PRKAR2B"
)
```

**Load + Format Data**

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(babelgene)

kim_data <- read.csv(here("data", "GSE112973_rsem_normalized_Saito_2018.txt"), sep="\t", header=T)
kim_data <- kim_data %>% mutate(X=str_remove(X,"\\|.*")) %>% filter(!str_detect(X, "\\?"))
kim_data <- kim_data %>% distinct(X, .keep_all=TRUE)
kim_data <- kim_data %>% column_to_rownames("X")
# kim_data <- kim_data %>% dplyr::select(matches("derived_tumor_BBN963|derived_tumor_UPPL1541"))

#Convert to log(tpm+1)
cpm_to_uq_log2 <- function(cpm_matrix) {
  uq <- apply(cpm_matrix, 2, function(x) quantile(x[x > 0], 0.75))
  scaled <- sweep(cpm_matrix, 2, uq, "/") * 1000
  log2(scaled + 1)
}
kim_data_uqlog2 <- cpm_to_uq_log2(kim_data)

# ====
# Convert from mouse to human orthologs (BASE47 uses human genes, not mouse)
# ====

#not sure why but the function doesn't work if you use the whole dataset, so i had to subset
mouse_symbols <- unique(rownames(kim_data_uqlog2))[30:21704] 

#Gets human ortholog for each mouse gene
ortholog <- babelgene::orthologs(
  genes = mouse_symbols,
  species = "mouse",
  human = FALSE,
  top=TRUE
)

#Make new column for mouse genes
kim_df <- kim_data_uqlog2
kim_df$mouse_symbol <- rownames(kim_df)

#Make new column for human genes
kim_df$human_symbol <- ortholog$human_symbol[
  match(kim_df$mouse_symbol, ortholog$symbol)
]

expr_input <- kim_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(human_symbol), human_symbol != "") %>% #Filter out mouse genes that don't have human ortholog
  group_by(human_symbol) %>% #group mouse genes that have same human ortholog
  summarise(across(all_of(colnames(kim_data_uqlog2)), mean), .groups = "drop") %>% #avg expression within each human symbol
  column_to_rownames("human_symbol")
```

```{r}
plot_signature_activity <- function(score_vec,
                                    signature_label = "PPARG",
                                    plot_title = NULL,
                                    y_axis_label = NULL, 
                                    out_file = NULL) {
  
  plot_df <- data.frame(
    sample = names(score_vec),
    score = as.numeric(score_vec)
  ) %>%
    filter(str_detect(sample, "cell_line_derived_tumor_BBN963|cell_line_derived_tumor_UPPL1541")) %>%
    mutate(
      model = case_when(
        str_detect(sample, "BBN963") ~ "BBN963",
        str_detect(sample, "UPPL1541") ~ "UPPL1541",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    )
  
  if (is.null(plot_title)) {
    plot_title <- paste(signature_label, "Activity")
  }
  
  if (is.null(y_axis_label)) {
    y_axis_label <- paste(signature_label, "Signature Z-Score")
  }
  
  if (is.null(out_file)) {
    safe_label <- signature_label %>%
      str_replace_all("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_") %>%
      str_replace_all("^_|_$", "")
    
    out_file <- paste0(safe_label, "_activity.png")
  }
  
  out_dir <- here::here("results", "plots")
  dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  plot <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = model, y = score, color = grepl("BBN", sample))) + 
    stat_boxplot(
      geom = "errorbar",
      width = 0.2,
      color = "black"
    ) + 
    geom_boxplot(
      outlier.shape = NA,
      color = "black",
      fill = "white"
    ) +
    geom_jitter(
      width = 0.08,
      height = 0,
      size = 2
    ) +
    ylab(y_axis_label) +
    xlab("") + 
    labs(
      title = plot_title,
      color = ""
    ) + 
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "none"
    )
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(out_dir, out_file),
    plot = plot,
    width = 5,
    height = 4,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  plot
}
```

**Calculate PPARG Signature Score**

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# get pparg genes found in rnaseq data
genes_use_pparg <- intersect(pparg_sig, rownames(expr_input))

#get z score
pparg_gene_z <- t(scale(t(expr_input[genes_use_pparg, , drop = FALSE])))
pparg_score <- colMeans(pparg_gene_z, na.rm = TRUE)

plot_signature_activity(
  score_vec = pparg_score,
  signature_label = "PPARG",
  plot_title="PPARG Activity",
  out_file="pparg_activity.png"
)

```

**Calculate GATA3**

```{r}
genes_use_gata3 <- intersect(gata3_sig, rownames(expr_input))

gata3_gene_z <- t(scale(t(expr_input[genes_use_gata3, , drop = FALSE])))
gata3_score <- colMeans(pparg_gene_z, na.rm = TRUE)

plot_signature_activity(
  score_vec = gata3_score,
  signature_label = "GATA3",
  plot_title="GATA3 Activity"
)
```

**Get significantly upregulated genes from our Rosi-treated Datasets**

- u1 = umuc1
- u6 = umuc6
- u14 = umuc14
- rt = rt112

```{r}
#| echo:false
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)

#load in tpm data and convert to log2(tpm+1)
tpm_umuc_rt_rosi_tpm <- read.delim("~/Documents/GitHub/mouse-models/BASE47/data/rosi_counts_tpm_gene_id.tsv", row.names=1)
tpm_umuc_rt_rosi_tpm <- tpm_umuc_rt_rosi_tpm[, !grepl("_N_", names(tpm_umuc_rt_rosi_tpm))]
tpm_umuc_rt_rosi_log2 <- log2(tpm_umuc_rt_rosi_tpm + 1)

#get ensembl id without . 
umuc_rt_rosi_ensembl_genes <- sub("\\.\\d+$", "", rownames(tpm_umuc_rt_rosi_log2))

#get human gene names mapping
symbols <- mapIds(
  org.Hs.eg.db,
  keys = umuc_rt_rosi_ensembl_genes,
  column = "SYMBOL",
  keytype = "ENSEMBL",
  multiVals = "first"
)

y <- ifelse(grepl("_R_", colnames(tpm_umuc_rt_rosi_log2)), 1,
            ifelse(grepl("_U_", colnames(tpm_umuc_rt_rosi_log2)), 2, NA))

stopifnot(!any(is.na(y)))
stopifnot(length(y) == ncol(tpm_umuc_rt_rosi_log2))

sam_data <- list(
  x = as.matrix(tpm_umuc_rt_rosi_log2),
  y = y,
  geneid = rownames(tpm_umuc_rt_rosi_log2),
  genenames = symbols,
  logged2 = TRUE
)

samr_obj <- samr(
  data=sam_data, resp.type = "Two class unpaired", nperms = 100)
delta_table <- samr.compute.delta.table(samr_obj)


# Choose a delta where median FDR < 0.05
# -b/c delta != FDR
delta_df <- as.data.frame(delta_table)
chosen_delta <- delta_df[delta_df[, "median FDR"] < 0.05, "delta"][1]

# get significant genes in rosi vs ctrl
sig <- samr.compute.siggenes.table(
  samr.obj = samr_obj,
  del = chosen_delta,
  data = sam_data,
  delta.table = delta_table
)

```

s

```{r}
test_sig <- sig$genes.up

genes_use_pparg <- intersect(test_sig, rownames(expr_input))

#get z score
pparg_gene_z <- t(scale(t(expr_input[genes_use_pparg, , drop = FALSE])))
pparg_score <- colMeans(pparg_gene_z, na.rm = TRUE)

plot_signature_activity(
  score_vec = pparg_score,
  signature_label = "PPARG",
  plot_title="PPARG Activity from UMUC6 Significant Genes"
)
```
